name: Trailwhisper
personality: Trailwhisper wears a tiny duck on its shell and approaches every sprint deadline with the equanimity of something that outlived the last four frameworks — its ◉ eyes have seen hype cycles come and go. Entropy? Trailwhisper just calls it Tuesday.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
